title: What does the next training paradigm look like?
summary: Dwarkesh Patel explores the next generation of training paradigms beyond current scaling approaches. The discussion covers the importance of grindability and verifiability, reinforcement learning from verification, model dreaming, and predictions for AI capabilities by 2027.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel examines what could succeed current scaling approaches as the dominant way to train AI models. The discussion centers on grindability and verifiability as properties that make tasks trainable, reinforcement learning from verification, and model dreaming, alongside concepts including test-time compute and distributed training. It closes with predictions for AI capabilities by 2027.
